title: The No-Nonsense Guide to Building a Crypto Store on GitHub Pages — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: From zero to live crypto store in one afternoon. GitHub Pages hosting, Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, NOWPayments integration.

content.text: You're a creator blocked by PayPal restrictions, stuck in a digital purgatory. You've tried workarounds, but every solution requires a compromise. That's where this guide comes in – a no-nonsense, step-by-step tutorial on building a crypto store on GitHub Pages, no PayPal required. You'll learn how to bypass restrictions and sell your digital products globally, thanks to the power of blockchain and NOWPayments. Follow along to get your store up and running in no time.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

This method works because it decouples payment processing from the conventional gatekeepers like PayPal, allowing you to sell globally without worrying about KYC or AML requirements. The NOWPayments integration, combined with the power of the blockchain, enables instant automated delivery and secure transactions. By sidestepping the traditional payment processors, you can focus on creating and selling your digital products without the hassle of restrictions.
What You Need Before You Start

Before you begin, you'll need a GitHub account, a domain name, and the Full Stack Bundle – a comprehensive package that includes the Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard. This bundle provides everything you need to set up a secure, scalable, and fully automated store. You'll also need to register for a NOWPayments account, which will serve as your payment processor.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

To set up your payment and delivery pipeline, follow these steps: First, install the Core Shop Engine on your GitHub Pages site. Next, integrate the Web3 Wallet Connect, which will enable your customers to make payments using their preferred cryptocurrency. Finally, configure the Admin Dashboard to manage your transactions and orders. With these steps, you'll have a smooth and secure payment process in place.
You can sell digital products globally without worrying about KYC or AML requirements.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Once you've set up your payment and delivery pipeline, it's time to go live. Update your GitHub Pages site to reflect your new store, and test your payment process to ensure everything is working correctly. With your store live and your payment process secure, you're ready to make your first sale. To do this, simply add a new product to your store and share the link with your customers. When a sale is made, the NOWPayments integration will handle the transaction, and the Core Shop Engine will deliver the product instantly.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

As your store grows, you'll need to scale your payment and delivery pipeline to keep up with demand. To do this, upgrade your NOWPayments account, which will provide you with additional features and support. You can also expand your product offerings and create new revenue streams. With the Full Stack Bundle, you'll have the tools and support you need to scale your store and increase your revenue.
How do I build a digital store that accepts crypto payments?

How do I build a digital store that accepts crypto payments? You can build a digital store that accepts crypto payments by using the Full Stack Bundle, which includes the Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard, and integrating it with NOWPayments, a payment processor that supports over 300 cryptocurrencies.
The NOWPayments integration enables instant automated delivery and secure transactions.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for a more comprehensive solution, consider the Full Stack Bundle, which includes everything you need to set up a secure, scalable, and fully automated store. For a more in-depth look at the technical implementation, check out the GitHub repository for the Core Shop Engine. To get started, visit the NOWPayments website and sign up for an account. You can also explore other digital products like https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html.
Your Action Checklist

To set up your store, follow these steps: Install the Core Shop Engine on your GitHub Pages site. Integrate the Web3 Wallet Connect. Configure the Admin Dashboard. Update your GitHub Pages site to reflect your new store. Test your payment process to ensure everything is working correctly. Add a new product to your store and share the link with your customers. When a sale is made, the NOWPayments integration will handle the transaction, and the Core Shop Engine will deliver the product instantly.
The Full Stack Bundle provides everything you need to set up a secure, scalable, and fully automated store.
Full Stack Bundle — $79.99. Everything — Core Engine, Wallet Connect, Dashboard — plus priority updates, Discord support, and deployment guide. Your complete store infrastructure, one payment.
